name: Nonrecognition of Gain on Special Use Valuation Property

eligibility.description: The estate must have made a valid Section 2032A election. Gain is only recognized to the extent the FMV at transfer exceeds the FMV at death (ignoring the special use reduction).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Limits the recognition of gain by an estate when transferring farm or real property valued under Section 2032A to a qualified heir.
